CREATE TABLE uuid_test (id UInt32, uuid_fixed FixedString(16));
SELECT reinterpretAsUUID(uuid_fixed) FROM uuid_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT reinterpretAsUUID(uuid_fixed) AS uuid_value FROM uuid_test WHERE id = 2;
SELECT reinterpretAsUUID(reverse(unhex(uuid_fixed))) AS reversed_uuid FROM uuid_test WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, reinterpretAsUUID(repo.uuid_fixed) AS repo_uuid FROM (SELECT id, uuid_fixed FROM uuid_test) AS repo;
SELECT reinterpretAsUUID(reverse(unhex((SELECT uuid_fixed FROM uuid_test WHERE id = 1)))) AS nested_uuid;
